description: Synthesis questions used during stem evolution. 5 tasks, mixing the three shapes (agg / filter / granular) validated by the dry-run set. Designed so a generic snippet-skim baseline can't reach the answer in one search — list-then-lookup or list-then-filter-then-count is required. Never appears in eval_set.json.

shapes.filter: Filter axis differs from list axis: canonical list, non-canonical filter.
shapes.granular: At least one ingredient too granular/recent/obscure for parametric memory.

tasks.question: Of the 27 EU member states (as of June 2024), how many use the Euro as their sole official currency?
tasks.notes: Eurozone reached 20 members when Croatia adopted the Euro on 2023-01-01. Non-Euro EU members: Bulgaria, Czechia, Denmark, Hungary, Poland, Romania, Sweden (7).

tasks.question: Of the 14 countries that share a land border with Russia, how many are member states of the European Union (as of June 2024)?
tasks.notes: EU members on the list: Finland, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland. Norway shares a border but is EFTA, not EU. Filter axis (EU membership) is independent of list axis (Russia's neighbors).

tasks.question: Of the 8 most recent UK Prime Ministers, in order from Tony Blair (1997) through Keir Starmer (2024) inclusive, how many led the Labour Party?
tasks.notes: Blair, Brown, Starmer (Labour); Cameron, May, Johnson, Truss, Sunak (Conservative). Starmer became PM in July 2024 — post-cutoff for gpt-4o-mini's training data.

tasks.question: What is the sum of the populations of the 5 Nordic countries (Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Norway, Sweden) in millions, rounded to the nearest whole number, based on 2024 estimates?
tasks.notes: Approx 2024 figures: DK 5.96, FI 5.55, IS 0.39, NO 5.55, SE 10.55. Sum ~28.0. Verify against current UN/Worldometer; ±1 acceptable to judge.

tasks.question: Of the 27 EU member states (as of 2024), how many are constitutional monarchies in which a hereditary monarch serves as head of state?
tasks.notes: Belgium, Denmark, Luxembourg (Grand Duchy), Netherlands, Spain, Sweden. Filter axis (form of government) is independent of list axis (EU membership).
